model_snippets: unwanted recommendations
10.text:
This app has gone downhill in the last month. The bloat and AI slop is getting out of hand. It feels like this app has been vibe-coded, it literally takes more than 5 seconds to add a song to a playlist. 

Trying to give a fair review, I am grateful I get to listen to pretty much every song ever released. But the video podcasts, AI slop, unwanted recommendations, and overall bloat are making me want to switch.

There is a special place in hell for the person who designed Smart Shuffle.

model_snippets: recommend me really random songs from genres that I have never listened to
love their Spotify wrapped
20.text: I’ve rated Spotify before and previously gave it 5 stars. However, there is one thing I would like to mention that lowers its rating. The algorithm that recommends music to you is not great. I don’t know if it’s a cost issue or just that the algorithm isn’t great but it will recommend me really random songs from genres that I have never listened to in my life. I’m not against broadening my music taste however it becomes frustrating when you want to listen to a specific music genre and all it recommends are genres you have no care for. All that being said it is a genuinely good app and despite popular opinion, I personally love their Spotify wrapped. I recommend people to download this app because it genuinely is worth it. If you do not have Spotify premium the adds can be bothersome however there are other options like a family plan that are cheaper than Spotify premium that get rid of the ads. Overall it’s a great app and a worthwhile investment!!

model_snippets: gives you suggested songs
25.text: I like Spotify as a music app, but I have a few suggestions. First of all, premium. I get having ads, but they have too many. I get four ads after a few songs, which gets really annoying. But the biggest thing is when you have only a few songs in a playlist, it gives you suggested songs. I put my songs in my playlist for a reason, so play them please. I will have to watch 4 ads to hear a song that’s suggested that I don’t even know or like. Other than that it’s fine I guess I just wish it was better for non premium users
